allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{ PID = $_.OwningProcess; Name = $p.Name; Path = $p.Path } })
PowerShell(if \($?\) { "git repo exists" } else { "not a git repo" })
PowerShell(git log --oneline -5 2>&1; "---STATUS---"; git status --short 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 60; "---COUNT---"; \(git status --short 2>&1 | Measure-Object\).Count)

PowerShell($c = Get-Command firebase -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.Source } else { "NOT FOUND" }; if \(Test-Path "d:\\pms-app\\firebase.json"\) { "firebase.json: YES" } else { "firebase.json: NO" })
PowerShell($c = Get-Command firebase -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "firebase: " + $c.Source; & firebase --version } else { "STILL NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "Port 3000 LISTENING \(PID " + \($c.OwningProcess -join ','\) + "\) - server already running" } else { "Port 3000 free" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $pids = $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($id in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed PID $id \(was holding port 3000\)" } catch { "Failed to kill PID $id : $_" } } } else { "Port 3000 already free - nothing to kill" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "Port 3000 STILL listening \(PID " + \($c.OwningProcess -join ','\) + "\)" } else { "Port 3000 free - all clear" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "Port 3000 BUSY \(PID " + \($c.OwningProcess -join ','\) + "\)" } else { "Port 3000 free" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $pids = $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($id in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "Killed PID $id" } catch { "Failed PID $id : $_" } } } else { "Port 3000 already free" }; $v = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($v\) { "STILL BUSY" } else { "Port 3000 free - all clear" })
Bash(rm -f src/App_tmp.js src/fix357.sed src/t.sed && echo "삭제 완료" && echo "--- 남은 untracked ---" && git status --short | grep '??')

PowerShell($now = Get-Date; $lock = Get-Item D:\\pms-app\\.git\\index.lock -Force; Write-Output \("지금:      " + $now.ToString\("HH:mm:ss"\)\); Write-Output \("락 생성시각: " + $lock.LastWriteTime.ToString\("HH:mm:ss"\)\); $age = \($now - $lock.LastWriteTime\).TotalSeconds; Write-Output \("락 나이\(초\): " + [math]::Round\($age\)\))

Bash(rm -f .git/index.lock && echo "락 제거" && git add src/App.js src/components/ProgressModal.jsx src/index.css CLAUDE.md "일일리포트/2026-06-23_UIUX개선-견본판-공정률막대.md" && echo "=== 스테이징됨 ===" && git diff --cached --name-only)
